video_id: Widdershins ｜ Animated short film by Simon Biggs.mp4.mp3
transcript: Thank you for watching. Dramatisk musikk GONG! Stop it! or I'll pluck out your eye and use you as a chamber pot. Ah. Let the circus begin. Isn't food supposed to bring pleasure as well as nourishment? Bah! Answer me this wise and all-knowing oracle. What is the point of a long and healthy life? If your long and healthy life is as long and as bloody healthy as mine. Two ten. Too thin Too tall Too happy Too feathery If you truly wanted to help me You would put those little arms around my neck and squeeze. Bravo, man! Bravo! Go back. Go closer. I'm in love! Balderdash! My heart has a better compass than your cogs and gears. I will find her as soon as the dawn breaks. Bertie Bertie We must make haste! My lady awaits! Bertie! This is mutiny. You may not wake me, you may not dress me, but you will not! Stop it! Ha! Oh, my God. I'm not going to let you get away with this. What do you want, you clockwork devil? Poppycock, give as much a clear notion of what is round the next corner as I. That was quite an exit. Let's do it again. Perdi! Get back, or I'll rip out your cogs and... Polish them until they gleam. My lady, your chariot awaits.我会保护你的 © transcript Emily Beynon To be continued... Thank you. I don't know. To be continued... Bravo! Bravo! © BF-WATCH TV 2021
